title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Zydus Lifesciences
jsonLd.description:
Zydus Lifesciences has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zydus Lifesciences:
Zydus Lifesciences is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zydus Lifesciences!
